candidate_definitions.text: `speaches` is an OpenAI API-compatible server supporting streaming transcription, translation, and speech generation. Speach-to-Text is powered by [faster-whisper](https://github.com/SYSTRAN/faster-whisper) and for Text-to-Speech [piper](https://github.com/rhasspy/piper) and [Ko…
